response.justification: Bogdan is a talented, experienced software engineer with strong fundamentals in architecture, testing, and distributed systems design. However, he is fundamentally misaligned with this C++ role. His C++ experience is minimal (6 months at National Instruments, over 10 years ago) and his recent 12+ years focus entirely on web/backend technologies (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, AWS). More critically, there is no evidence of industrial automation, IoT, or IEC 62443 cybersecurity expertise—both central to this manufacturing-automation domain. While his learning ability is exceptional, hiring for immediate C++ and industrial-domain contribution would be a significant gamble.
strengths: Proven ability to architect high-performance, event-driven distributed systems (GISCollective platform, Dunnhumby microservices infrastructure)
Strong software craftsmanship culture with TDD, mentoring, and technical documentation—evident across multiple roles and open-source projects
20 years of broad experience across multiple languages and domains, demonstrating adaptability and deep engineering fundamentals
concerns: C++ expertise is minimal and severely outdated—only 6 months at National Instruments over 10 years ago; all recent work (12+ years) is TypeScript, JavaScript, DLang
Zero background in industrial automation, IoT, embedded systems, or IEC 62443 cybersecurity standards—core competencies for this role
Cloud experience is AWS-focused (AWS CDK); no Azure experience or evidence of real-time, multi-threaded, or networking-heavy systems development

key_factors.factor: Industrial automation and cybersecurity domain knowledge
Distributed systems architecture and design patterns
